name: kubernetes-deployer
description: Deploy and manage Kubernetes clusters with automated rollbacks, blue-green deployments, and health checking.

name: docker-compose-manager
description: Manage Docker Compose stacks with automatic dependency resolution and health checks.

name: github-actions-runner
description: Trigger and monitor GitHub Actions workflows from your agent.

name: terraform-manager
description: Apply, plan, and destroy Terraform infrastructure with state management and drift detection.

name: aws-lambda-deployer
description: Package and deploy AWS Lambda functions with environment configuration and alias management.

name: python-test-runner
description: Run pytest suites, parse results, and report failures with file and line references.

name: slack-notifier
description: Send formatted messages and alerts to Slack channels with attachment support.
